meta.name: That’s So Dee
meta.description: Dee Carter is a twelve-year-old powerhouse juggling a global business empire, a burgeoning music career, and the hilarious chaos of life in a mansion with her two superstar sisters. While she’s the CEO of the boardroom, navigating middle school and her "Visionary" siblings proves to be her biggest challenge yet. With a sharp wit and a "Mogul" mindset, she proves that age is just a number when you’re building a dynasty. That’s just how Dee does it!
